candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicitly tagged to Cost of Revenues/COGS and presented as a separate D&A component outside the selected parent row 'Cost of sales', so it should be added separately to the COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment losses on intangible assets and property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: This is a mixed total that includes impairment and multiple components across buckets, so it should not be used for COGS_DA to avoid contamination and double counting.
Generic depreciation is not explicitly tied to COGS; a more precise COGS-specific D&A row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit COGS-related D&A row. Did not use the broad D&A total because it includes impairment and non-COGS components.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A component outside the selected XSGA rows 'Other external costs' and 'Staff Costs'. With the only explicitly COGS-tagged amortization isolated elsewhere, this generic depreciation most plausibly belongs with operating overhead/XSGA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line outside the selected XSGA rows; absent any SG&A subtotal, it appears to be a standalone operating D&A component that should be added separately to overhead.
Separate amortization line outside the selected XSGA rows and not tagged to COGS, so it is best treated as XSGA-related operating amortization.
Separate operating amortization component outside the selected XSGA rows and not explicitly tied to COGS, so it should be added separately to XSGA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment losses on intangible assets and property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Broad total includes impairment and also includes the COGS-specific amortization component, so using it would mix buckets and risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicitly belongs to Cost of Revenues/COGS, not XSGA.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: Because XSGA was built only from 'Other external costs' and 'Staff Costs', separate operating D&A lines above EBIT should be added separately when they are not already embedded in those selected rows. Excluded the COGS-specific amortization row and excluded the broad D&A total because it includes impairment and mixed-bucket content.
